questions.question: What does the loss function represent in neural network training?
questions.questionZh: 在神经网络训练中，损失函数（Loss Function）代表什么？
options: The number of incorrect predictions
A differentiable measure of how wrong the model's predictions are, which the optimizer minimizes
The size of the training dataset
The learning rate schedule
optionsZh: 错误预测的数量
衡量模型预测误差的可微（differentiable）指标，优化器（optimizer）会将其最小化。
训练数据集 (training dataset) 的规模
学习率调度 (Learning Rate Schedule)
questions.explanation: The loss function maps predictions and targets to a single scalar that the optimizer minimizes via gradient descent. It must be differentiable so gradients can be computed.
questions.explanationZh: 损失函数（Loss Function）将预测值（Predictions）与目标值（Targets）映射为单个标量（Scalar），优化器（Optimizer）通过梯度下降（Gradient Descent）最小化该标量。该函数必须是可微的（Differentiable），以便计算梯度（Gradients）。

questions.question: Why is cross-entropy preferred over MSE for classification tasks?
questions.questionZh: 为什么在分类任务中，交叉熵（Cross-Entropy）比均方误差（MSE）更受青睐？
options: Cross-entropy is faster to compute
Cross-entropy punishes confident wrong predictions exponentially via -log(p), while MSE gives weak gradients near 0 and 1
MSE only works for regression
Cross-entropy doesn't require labels
optionsZh: 交叉熵（Cross-entropy）的计算速度更快。
交叉熵（Cross-entropy）通过 `-log(p)` 对高置信度的错误预测施加指数级惩罚，而均方误差（MSE）在预测值接近 0 和 1 时提供的梯度较弱。
均方误差（Mean Squared Error）仅适用于回归（Regression）。
交叉熵（Cross-entropy）不需要标签（labels）
questions.explanation: When a model confidently predicts the wrong class (p near 0 for true class), -log(p) produces a huge loss and strong gradient. MSE produces weak gradients in the same situation because sigmoid is flat near 0 and 1.
questions.explanationZh: 当模型以高置信度预测了错误的类别（即真实类别的概率 p 接近 0）时，-log(p) 会产生极大的损失值与较强的梯度。而在相同情况下，均方误差（Mean Squared Error, MSE）产生的梯度较弱，因为 Sigmoid 函数（Sigmoid）在 0 和 1 附近趋于平坦。

questions.question: What happens if you use MSE loss for binary classification?
questions.questionZh: 如果在二分类 (Binary Classification) 中使用均方误差损失 (Mean Squared Error Loss) 会发生什么？
options: Training diverges immediately
The model can minimize loss by predicting 0.5 for everything, achieving MSE=0.25 without learning
The model trains normally
Gradients explode
optionsZh: 训练 (Training) 立即发散 (Diverge)
该模型可以通过对所有样本统一预测为 0.5 来最小化损失（Loss），从而在无需学习的情况下实现均方误差（MSE）为 0.25。
模型训练正常。
梯度爆炸 (Exploding Gradients)
questions.explanation: With MSE on a balanced binary dataset, predicting 0.5 for every input gives MSE=0.25 -- the minimum achievable without discrimination. The model satisfies the loss without learning any useful patterns.
questions.explanationZh: 在平衡二分类数据集（balanced binary dataset）上使用均方误差（Mean Squared Error, MSE）时，若对每个输入均预测为 0.5，则 MSE=0.25——这是在不进行任何类别区分的情况下所能达到的最小值。此时模型虽然使损失函数达到了最小，却并未学到任何有用的模式。

questions.question: What does label smoothing do and why is it useful?
questions.questionZh: 标签平滑（Label Smoothing）的作用是什么？为什么它很有用？
options: It removes noisy labels from the dataset
It replaces hard 0/1 targets with soft values like 0.1/0.9, preventing overconfident predictions and improving generalization
It applies a moving average to the loss
It smooths the learning rate schedule
optionsZh: 它从数据集中移除噪声标签（noisy labels）。
它将 0/1 硬目标值（hard targets）替换为 0.1/0.9 等软值（soft values），从而防止预测过于自信，并提升泛化能力（generalization）。
它对损失（Loss）进行移动平均（Moving Average）处理。
它对学习率调度（Learning Rate Schedule）进行平滑处理。
questions.explanation: Label smoothing changes targets from [0,0,1,0] to [0.025,0.025,0.925,0.025] (with alpha=0.1). This prevents the model from pushing logits to infinity to achieve hard targets, reducing overconfidence.
questions.explanationZh: 标签平滑（Label Smoothing）将目标分布从 [0,0,1,0] 调整为 [0.025,0.025,0.925,0.025]（alpha=0.1）。该机制可防止模型为拟合硬目标（hard targets）而将逻辑值（logits）推向无穷大，从而有效降低过度自信（overconfidence）。

questions.question: In contrastive loss (InfoNCE), what role does the temperature parameter play?
questions.questionZh: 在对比损失（Contrastive Loss，如 InfoNCE）中，温度参数（Temperature Parameter）起什么作用？
options: It controls the learning rate
It controls how sharp the similarity distribution is -- lower temperature means harder separation between positives and negatives
It sets the number of negative samples
It determines the embedding dimension
optionsZh: 它控制学习率（learning rate）。
它控制相似度分布（similarity distribution）的尖锐程度——温度（temperature）越低，正负样本之间的区分度就越高。
它用于设置负样本 (negative samples) 的数量。
它决定了嵌入维度（Embedding Dimension）。
questions.explanation: Temperature divides the similarity scores before softmax. Lower temperature (e.g., 0.07) creates a sharper distribution where the model must clearly separate positives from negatives. Higher temperature is more forgiving.
questions.explanationZh: 在 softmax 操作之前，温度（Temperature）参数会作为除数对相似度分数（similarity scores）进行缩放。较低的温度（例如 0.07）会形成更尖锐的分布，迫使模型清晰地区分正样本（positives）与负样本（negatives）。较高的温度则更为宽容。
